item.title: WE ARE GOING PUBLIC!
item.author: Alex Brown Sobinec
item.description: Killzone Mercenary Server is now Public!
item.content:
Greetings, everyone!

I would like to announce, that the servers are now public!

In order for you to connect to the servers, you will need to follow text guide or a video guide.

You can now play Killzone Mercenary online again! We will soon have regular events that you can attend, so stay tuned!

Now, go play, and have fun!

With VITA4EVER, Revive the past - Together!

item.title: WE ARE IN THE GAME!
item.author: Alex Brown Sobinec
item.content:
Greetings, everyone!

I would like to announce, that we are in the game!

You can find some videos of us playing test matches here:

Video by Just Killzone Video by Eftlz06

I would like to note that it might take some more time to finish up some things, so give us some time.

With VITA4EVER, Revive the past - Together? TOGETHER!

item.title: Small Website Update
item.author: Alex Brown Sobinec
item.description: A small website update, nothing much.
item.content:
Greetings!

In this small website update we:

  1. Added our Code Of Conduct that contains game rules and Discord server rules.
  2. Updated some styles
  3. Removed a typo in the header.

Is that all?

With VITA4EVER, Revive the past - Together.

Indeed, that is all. Ignore any text below, it's simply an error in the XML parser.

Prope hic dies sunt, cum iterum omnes iterum iungemur, primae tabulae semper par vobis mox praebebuntur. Exspecta nos ut caelos accendas.

item.title: Feed Created!
item.author: Alex Brown Sobinec
item.description: Our RSS feed is now out, also a new medium website update!
item.content:
Greetings! The official VITA4EVER RSS feed has been created.

To add it to your RSS reader, please use this link: https://vita4ever.github.io/Feed.xml

You can also use a built in RSS reader on our website, just visit this page.

We also added a status page, where you can see the current status of development. To visit it, open this page.

That is the end of this post. Please await for future news and updates.

And as usual...

With VITA4EVER, Revive the past - Together.
